title: TripBudget
description: A trip's budget envelope with FX-aware CAD costs and an insurance-coverage status, derived from a parsed itinerary and linked to the spine travel budget category (FR-TRV-001). Provided by Module 11 (Travel) to Rewards (status), Bills (trip bills), and Workspace. MONEY: every *_cents field is integer minor units (CAD); fx_rate is an arbitrary-precision decimal string (never float). Foreign costs are converted to CAD in arbitrary precision and rounded half-up at the final cent before storage/display. A TripBudget whose underlying FX rate is stale MUST be flagged via freshness; a stale FX MONEY input MUST NOT be presented as a fresh CAD figure (Constitution IV/VIII).

profile_id.description: Owning profile; every cross-profile read is authZ-checked server-side (threat model).

name.description: User/derived trip name (displayed verbatim; not translated).

budget_category.description: Canonical spine BudgetState category this trip is linked to (typically 'travel'); ties trip costs to budget headroom (FR-TRV-001).

estimated_total_cad_cents.description: Sum of all itinerary-item CAD costs, integer cents. Each foreign cost converted via a timestamped FX rate in arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent (FR-TRV-001).

budgeted_cad_cents.description: Amount allocated to this trip from the spine travel budget, integer cents. Optional when the user has not set a per-trip allocation.

headroom_cad_cents.description: budgeted - estimated_total for this trip, integer cents. Negative = projected over travel budget. Withheld when BudgetState is stale/missing (money input).

currency_breakdown.description: Per-source-currency totals so a consumer can see the FX exposure behind the CAD figure.

currency.description: ISO-4217 source currency of the underlying bookings.

foreign_amount_cents.description: Integer minor units of the FOREIGN currency before conversion.

cad_amount_cents.description: Converted CAD integer cents = round_half_up(foreign × fx_rate).

fx_rate.description: Foreign→CAD rate, arbitrary-precision decimal STRING (never float). Applied in arbitrary precision, rounded once (FR-TRV-001 / FR-X-002).

fx_freshness.description: Freshness of the FX rate used; stale ⇒ the converted figure is flagged (umbrella multi-currency edge case).

insurance_status.description: Insurance-gap assessment against card perks from Rewards CardLineup (FR-TRV-002). 'gap' surfaces a flag with the relevant card perk; 'unknown' is used when coverage cannot be determined — never assumed covered.

state.description: Default for an unassessed trip is 'unknown' — never 'covered' by assumption.

covering_card_id.description: Rewards card_id whose perk provides coverage, when state = covered.

gap_types.description: Coverage types still missing, when state = gap.

data_completeness.description: partial when the itinerary or BudgetState was computed on a partial picture; consumers MUST mark dependent views incomplete (Partial state).

freshness.description: Freshness of the inputs this TripBudget was derived from (FX rates, BudgetState, parsed confirmations). Stale FX/budget money inputs ⇒ consumers flag/withhold the CAD figures.
